exampleSentences: Có lẽ anh sẽ đi chơi vào cuối tuần này nếu trời đẹp.
Chị có lẽ quên mang theo điện thoại nên không trả lời tin nhắn.
Em có lẽ sẽ thử món ăn mới ở nhà hàng hôm nay.
notes:
có lẽ = maybe, probably. It shows you’re not 100% sure about something.

It usually goes before the subject or before the verb, and sounds a bit more thoughtful or uncertain than just “maybe.”  

It’s softer and more polite than saying something directly as a fact.  
Close synonym: chắc (là) = probably (a bit stronger confidence).
notes_md:
**có lẽ** = maybe, probably. It shows you’re not 100% sure about something.

It usually goes before the subject or before the verb, and sounds a bit more thoughtful or uncertain than just “maybe.”  

It’s softer and more polite than saying something directly as a fact.  
Close synonym: **chắc (là)** = probably (a bit stronger confidence).
exampleSentencesTranslated: Maybe I will go out this weekend if the weather is nice.
Maybe she forgot to bring her phone so she didn't reply to the message.
Maybe I will try a new dish at the restaurant today.

example.vi: Hôm nay trời nhiều mây, có lẽ sẽ mưa.
example.en: Today the sky is cloudy; it might rain.

definitions.vi: Từ dùng để diễn tả sự không chắc chắn, có thể xảy ra.
definitions.en: A word used to express uncertainty or possibility.
